title: Beef Brisket Papillote
description: A flavorful and tender beef brisket dish cooked in a papillote with a sweet and tangy jelly sauce.

ingredients.name: Beef Brisket
ingredients.notes: preferably with a thick layer of fat

ingredients.name: Jelly
ingredients.notes: any flavor, such as apricot or quince

instructions: Season the beef brisket with salt and black pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Sear the beef brisket until browned on all sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the beef brisket to a papillote sheet, leaving a 1-inch border around it.
Brush the jelly over the beef brisket, making sure to stay within the borders.
Place another papillote sheet on top and crimp the edges to seal the packet.
Place the papillote on a baking sheet and bake for 2 1/2 hours, or until the beef is tender and falls apart easily.
Let the beef rest for 10-15 minutes before slicing and serving.
